TestCase z19Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation: decrement a random element by 3 when element > 3
    int idx = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (follow_case.a[idx] > 3) {
        follow_case.a[idx] -= 3;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
